overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy, cobblestone city street resembling historic New Orleans. The character moves from a town square with a gazebo through theater districts and intersections while heavy rain creates wet, reflective surfaces and misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with wooden gazebo and flowering trees

events.description: exits the park square with gazebo onto the cobblestone city street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy town square toward the street exit, passing the gazebo on the left

entered.detail: octagonal wooden bandstand with pointed roof and decorative railings
tree with pink blossoms visible against the gray rainy sky
black wrought iron fence lining the garden bed
multi-story historic brick building with white trim visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rainy town square featuring a prominent wooden gazebo and flowering cherry trees. The character walks forward on wet cobblestones, passing iron fences and garden beds, before transitioning onto the city street at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with stone mansions and iron balconies

events.description: character briefly turns to face the camera before continuing forward
theater building with vaudeville marquee becomes visible down the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beside historic mansions, briefly turning to glance back at the camera

entered.detail: large historic building with ornate stone railings and iron balconies
multi-story building with vertical 'THEATRE' signage and decorative facade
low stone retaining wall with iron fencing above

segments.scene_description: Walking along a cobblestone sidewalk beside grand stone mansions with ornate iron balconies. The character briefly turns to face the camera before continuing. The theater district becomes visible in the distance as the gazebo recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: theater district with vaudeville marquee and narrow street

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the theater building on the narrow cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street, passing from right to left

entered.detail: illuminated theater marquee with 'VAUDEVILLE' lettering and decorative bulbs
tall wooden pole with crossbars and electrical wires
red octagonal stop sign mounted on a pole
black carriage with red wheels pulled by a horse, moving along the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the narrow theater district street where the vaudeville marquee becomes prominent on the right. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the wet cobblestones, and wooden utility poles line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: town intersection with hotel and central statue

events.description: character turns left and begins crossing the cobblestone intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left to cross the street intersection toward the hotel building, navigating around the statue

entered.detail: three-story building with 'HOTEL' signage and balconies on the upper floors
stone pedestal with statue in the center of the intersection
wooden bench with iron armrests on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to cross the wide cobblestone intersection, passing a central statue monument. The hotel building becomes prominent on the left side while park benches line the right sidewalk, completing the crossing toward the opposite side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, historic city that transitions from a quiet garden square into a bustling urban intersection. It begins in a town square among flowering cherry trees and a wooden gazebo, moving across wet cobblestones and past iron fences. As the character leaves the square, the scene shifts to a sidewalk lined with grand stone mansions and ornate balconies, with the theater district gradually emerging in the distance. The camera then follows the character into the narrow theater district, passing a prominent vaudeville marquee and a horse-drawn carriage beneath wooden utility poles. Finally, the movement turns left to cross a wide cobblestone intersection, passing a central statue monument and a large hotel building to reach the opposite side of the street.
